articles.title: Margo’s Got Money Troubles, starring Elle Fanning, premieres on Apple TV
articles.summary: Apple TV subscribers can now watch the first three episodes of comedic drama Margo’s Got Money Troubles , starring Elle Fanning ( Predator: Badlands ), Michelle Pfeiffer ( Basic Instinct ), and Nicole Kidman ( The Hours ). Here are the details. more…
articles.title_zh: 《瑪歌的金錢煩惱》由艾莉·范寧主演，在 Apple TV 首映
articles.summary_zh: Apple TV 訂戶現在可以觀看由艾莉·范寧、米歇爾·菲佛和妮可·基德曼主演的喜劇劇集《瑪歌的金錢煩惱》的前三集。

articles.title: Apple reportedly threatened to remove Grok from the App Store over sexualized deepfakes
articles.summary: In a letter obtained exclusively by NBC News , Apple told U.S. senators how it worked behind the scenes to address the viral surge of sexualized deepfakes generated by Grok earlier this year. Here are the details. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple 據報威脅因色情化身假視頻從 App Store 移除 Grok
articles.summary_zh: Apple 在一封被 NBC News 獨家獲得的信函中向美國參議員詳述了其如何在幕後應對今年早期 Grok 產生的色情化身假視頻激增問題。

articles.title: Redmi R70 and R70m debut with Unisoc chipset, big batteries
articles.summary: Redmi today launched the R70 and R70m in China. These are basically the same phone with one key difference - the battery capacity. Thus, the R70 comes with a 6.9-inch LCD screen with 720x1600 resolution, 120Hz refresh rate, 240Hz touch sampling rate, and 800-nit peak brightness, the Unisoc T8300 SoC at the helm, LPDDR4x RAM, UFS 2.2 storage, a 13MP rear camera, an 8MP front camera, and a 6,000 mAh battery with support for 15W wired and 7.5W reverse wired charging. Redmi R70/R70m official images The R70m, on the other hand, has a 6,300 mAh battery with the same charging...
articles.title_zh: Redmi R70 和 R70m 採用 Unisoc 晶片和大容量電池亮相
articles.summary_zh: Redmi 今日在中國推出 R70 和 R70m，這兩款手機基本相同，主要差異在於電池容量。R70 搭載 6.9 吋 LCD 螢幕、Unisoc T8300 晶片等規格。

articles.title: Oppo Find X9s to launch globally alongside Find X9 Ultra
articles.summary: Oppo is set to unveil the Find X9 Ultra and Find X9s Pro in China next week. The former is already confirmed to launch in global markets, and Oppo has now announced that it will also launch a Find X9s variant globally. The Find X9s will be unveiled alongside the Find X9 Ultra on April 21. In short, it appears that China will get the Find X9s Pro, whereas global markets will receive the non-Pro model. We’d reported earlier that Oppo will launch the Find X9s Pro globally, but that doesn’t seem to be the case. Oppo has also confirmed several key specifications of the Find X9s. The...
articles.title_zh: Oppo Find X9s 將與 Find X9 Ultra 同步全球推出
articles.summary_zh: Oppo 將於下週在中國發布 Find X9 Ultra 和 Find X9s Pro，並已宣佈 Find X9s 變型版本也將在全球推出，推出時間定於 4 月 21 日。

articles.title: AWS Interconnect is now generally available, with a new option to simplify last-mile connectivity
articles.summary: Today, we’re announcing the general availability of AWS Interconnect – multicloud , a managed private connectivity service that connects your Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC) directly to VPCs on other cloud providers. We’re also introducing AWS Interconnect – last mile , a new capability that simplifies how you establish high-speed, private connections to AWS from your branch offices, data centers, and remote locations through your existing network providers. Large enterprises increasingly run workloads across multiple cloud providers, whether to use specialized services, meet data residency requirements, or support teams that have standardized on different providers. Connecting those environments reliably and securely has historically required significant coordination: managing V
articles.title_zh: AWS Interconnect 現已正式推出，提供簡化最後一哩路連接的新選項
articles.summary_zh: AWS 宣佈推出 AWS Interconnect – multicloud 託管私有連接服務，可直接連接 Amazon VPC 與其他雲端供應商的 VPC，並推出新的 AWS Interconnect – last mile 功能。

articles.title: The Surprising MacBook Neo Competitor You’ve Never Heard Of
articles.summary: In many ways, the HP OmniBook 5 is a better budget laptop than the MacBook Neo, especially when the discounts are strong.
articles.title_zh: 令人驚訝的 MacBook Neo 競爭對手 - 你從未聽說過
articles.summary_zh: 在許多方面，HP OmniBook 5 都是比 MacBook Neo 更好的預算筆記本電腦，尤其是在折扣力度強勁的時候。

articles.title: Bessent Calls Anthropic’s Mythos a Breakthrough in China AI Race
articles.summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent hailed Anthropic PBC’s Mythos as a revolutionary step that will keep America ahead of China in AI, endorsing an industry leader that’s clashed with Washington over its role in military endeavors.
articles.title_zh: Bessent 稱 Anthropic 的 Mythos 是中美 AI 競賽中的突破性進展
articles.summary_zh: 美國財政部長 Scott Bessent 稱讚 Anthropic PBC 的 Mythos 是革命性的一步，將保持美國在 AI 領域領先中國的地位，力挺這家曾因軍事用途問題與華盛頓發生衝突的業界領袖。

articles.title: Anthropic Attracts Investor Offers at an $800 Billion Valuation
articles.summary: Anthropic PBC has received several offers from investors for a new round of funding that could value the artificial intelligence startup at about $800 billion or higher — overtures that the Claude maker has so far resisted, according to people familiar with the matter.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 在 80 億美元估值下吸引投資者出價
articles.summary_zh: 據知情人士透露，Anthropic PBC 收到多家投資者的新融資報價，估值可能達到 80 億美元或更高，但這家 Claude 開發商目前仍未接受這些邀約。

articles.title: US Faces $7.8 Billion Measles Risk as Vaccination Rates Decline, Study Finds
articles.summary: A sustained drop in childhood vaccinations could cost the US about $7.8 billion in measles outbreaks over five years, a new study found.
articles.title_zh: 研究發現疫苗接種率下降使美國面臨 78 億美元麻疹風險
articles.summary_zh: 一項新研究發現，兒童疫苗接種持續下降可能在五年內導致美國約 78 億美元的麻疹爆發成本。

articles.title: China’s Data Centers Are Plugging Into REIT-Style Financing Wave
articles.summary: China’s data center operators are tapping a fast-growing asset-backed security market, raising more than a billion dollars from investors hungry for higher yields.
articles.title_zh: 中國數據中心接入 REIT 式融資浪潮
articles.summary_zh: 中國數據中心運營商正在利用快速增長的資產支持證券市場融資，已從尋求更高收益的投資者手中籌集超過 10 億美元。

articles.title: Anthropic Wins Accolades From Canada’s AI Minister Over Mythos Approach
articles.summary: A Canadian cabinet minister praised Anthropic PBC’s decision to introduce its Mythos model to select companies and allow them to test the technology before releasing it more widely.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 因 Mythos 方案獲加拿大 AI 部長讚許
articles.summary_zh: 加拿大內閣部長讚揚了 Anthropic PBC 推出 Mythos 模型並允許精選公司先行測試該技術、再廣泛發布的決策。

articles.title: Stocks Continue Climb on Iran Peace Push | The Close 4/14/2026
articles.summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Wells Fargo CFO Mike Santomassimo, Commerzbank CEO Bettina Orlopp, UBS’ Erika Najarian, Phillips 66 CEO Mark Lashier, Charles Schwab’s Liz Ann Sonders, Stanford University’s Lanhee Chen, Tapestry CEO Joanne Crevoiserat, 23andMe Research Institute CEO Anne Wojcicki, Groot Hospitality Founder David Grutman, & NBA Champion & Entrepreneur Kyle Kuzma. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Ukraine’s military robot surge aims to offset drone risks to humans
articles.summary: Ukrainian ground robots and drones have demonstrated how to overcome a Russian military position by themselves while forcing the surrender of Russian soldiers, claimed Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. If true, that would represent a significant robotic milestone during the ongoing war that has already been significantly reshaped by drones—and it could offer lessons for how militaries worldwide may use robots and drones to do the dirtiest and most dangerous jobs in future conflicts. The claim by Zelenskyy has not been independently verified but was accompanied by a promotional video in which he described Ukraine’s military robots as having completed over 22,000 missions in the last three months. Ukraine’s defense ministry also recently described a threefold increase in the Ukrainian
articles.title_zh: 烏克蘭軍事機器人激增旨在抵消無人機對人類的風險

articles.title: Developers behind vibe coding app Anything detail next steps after months-long fight with Apple
articles.summary: Following a dispute that led to two removals from the App Store, the developers behind the vibe coding platform Anything are publicly accusing Apple of shutting out a new generation of app creators through outdated app review guidelines. Here are the details. more…
articles.title_zh: Anything 應用開發者在與 Apple 長期糾紛後公開下一步計畫
articles.summary_zh: Anything 編碼平台的開發者在遭 App Store 移除兩次後,公開指控 Apple 透過過時的應用審核指南將新一代應用創作者排除在外。

articles.title: Google rolls out April Android Canary build with experimental features for Pixel devices
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google has released the April Android Canary build with new experimental features for Pixel 8 and above. New UI tweaks include a “You’re all caught up” message in the notification shade and redesigned, collapsible app shortcut and action menus. Google has just released a new Android Canary build, giving developers early access to features still in testing. The new release, marked Android Canary 2604 (ZP11.260320.007), is now available for a wide range of Pixel devices, including the Pixel 8 series and above. It was released a few days earlier this month, considering we got last month’s Canary build (2603) on March 19.
articles.title_zh: Google 推出四月 Android Canary 版本,為 Pixel 裝置帶來實驗性功能
articles.summary_zh: Google 發布四月 Android Canary 版本,為 Pixel 8 及以上機型提供新的實驗性功能,包括通知欄中的「已閱讀所有內容」訊息以及重新設計的可摺疊應用快捷選單。

articles.title: Oppo reveals the main specs for the Pad 5 Pro and Pad Mini
articles.summary: Oppo is launching the Pad 5 Pro and the Pad Mini on April 21 alongside the Find X9 Ultra and the Find X9s Pro. Now, the brand has revealed more details about the upcoming tablets. The Pad 5 Pro will be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC. It has a 13.2-inch 3.4K LCD screen with 144Hz refresh rate and 1,000-nit peak brightness, and a 13,380 mAh battery with support for 67W wired charging. Oppo Pad 5 Pro official promotional images This tablet will be 5.94mm thick and will weigh 672g. It will have support for a keyboard case with a trackpad and backlit keys, and this will...
articles.title_zh: Oppo 揭露 Pad 5 Pro 和 Pad Mini 的主要規格
articles.summary_zh: Oppo 將於 4 月 21 日推出 Pad 5 Pro 和 Pad Mini,搭載 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 處理器,Pad 5 Pro 配備 13.2 吋 3.4K LCD 螢幕,支持 144Hz 刷新率。

articles.title: Anthropic’s rise is giving some OpenAI investors second thoughts
articles.summary: One investor who has backed both companies told the FT that justifying OpenAI's recent round required assuming an IPO valuation of $1.2 trillion or more — making Anthropic's current $380 billion valuation look like the relative bargain.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 的崛起讓某些 OpenAI 投資者重新考慮
articles.summary_zh: 一位同時支持兩家公司的投資者告訴英國金融時報，為 OpenAI 最近一輪融資辯護需要假設 IPO 估值達 1.2 兆美元或更高，這使得 Anthropic 目前 3,800 億美元的估值看起來相對划算。

articles.title: Optimize object storage costs automatically with smart tier—now generally available
articles.summary: We are excited to announce the general availability (GA) of smart tier for Azure Blob and Data Lake Storage. Smart tier is a fully managed, automated tiering capability for Azure Blob Storage and Data Lake Storage that helps optimize storage costs without ongoing operational effort. By continuously optimizing data placement, smart tier ensures your storage costs are aligned with actual usage. Get in-depth details about smart tier As data estates expand and access patterns evolve, managing lifecycle rules at scale becomes complex. Customers need automated, continuous tiering to keep costs aligned with usage. Smart tier continuously evaluates your data access patterns and automatically moves objects across the hot, cool, and cold tiers to keep your costs aligned with usage without manual con
articles.title_zh: 使用智慧層級自動優化物件儲存成本—現已正式推出
articles.summary_zh: Azure Blob 和 Data Lake Storage 的智慧層級正式推出。這是一項完全受控的自動分層功能，可協助優化儲存成本，無需持續進行操作管理。

articles.title: Lululemon Sparks China Social Media Debate On ‘Forever Chemicals’
articles.summary: A Texas investigation into Lululemon Athletica Inc.’s clothing for the presence of so-called “forever chemicals” has sparked a wave of debate across Chinese social media, underscoring the risks the brand faces in one of its most important growth markets.
articles.title_zh: Lululemon 在中國社交媒體上引發「永久化學物質」辯論
articles.summary_zh: 德州對 Lululemon Athletica Inc. 服裝中所謂「永久化學物質」的調查在中國社交媒體上引發廣泛討論,凸顯該品牌在其最重要增長市場面臨的風險。

articles.title: Nvidia’s New AI Models Spark Rally in Quantum Computing Stocks
articles.summary: Asian software and information-technology stocks surged after Nvidia Corp. unveiled a suite of new open-source AI models aimed at accelerating progress within quantum computing.
articles.title_zh: Nvidia 新 AI 模型推動量子計算股票上漲
articles.summary_zh: Nvidia Corp. 推出一套新的開源 AI 模型以加速量子計算進展後,亞洲軟體和資訊科技股票大幅上漲。

articles.title: Perplexity's CBO on products, firm's growth on AI
articles.summary: Dmitry Shevelenko, Chief Business Officer at Perplexity, discusses the company's growth and new product push of Perplexity Computer, in improving search functions from AI technology for its customers. He speaks exclusively with David Ingles and Yvonne Man on the sidelines of the HSBC Global Investment Summit in Hong Kong on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Perplexity 首席商務官談論產品與公司 AI 成長
articles.summary_zh: Perplexity 首席商務官 Dmitry Shevelenko 討論公司的成長和 Perplexity Computer 新產品如何透過 AI 技術改善客戶的搜尋功能。

articles.title: Risk Rally Builds as Markets Fade Iran Risks | The Asia Trade 4/15/2026
articles.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Paul Allen, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 風險資產上漲勢頭增強,市場淡化伊朗風險 | 亞洲交易 4/15/2026
articles.summary_zh: 「Bloomberg: The Asia Trade」帶您了解亞洲交易時段開始時所需的所有資訊,Bloomberg TV 從東京和雪梨現場直播,邪重市場領導者的見解和分析。

articles.title: Anthropic’s Mythos Is a Wake-up Call For Everyone, Not Just Banks
articles.summary: Mythos, a new artificial intelligence model that Anthropic PBC has teased as too dangerous to release, looked at first like a problem for banks. Days after the company announced the new technology, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent summoned Wall Street leaders to make sure they were taking precautions to defend their systems, creating invaluable publicity for Anthropic and raising questions about who gets an exclusive peek at its threatening progeny.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 的 Mythos 對所有人都是警示,不僅是銀行
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic PBC 推出的新 AI 模型 Mythos 被稱為過於危險而無法發佈,起初看似只是銀行的問題,但在公司宣佈這項新技術數天後,美國財政部長 Scott Bessent 召集華爾街領袖以確保他們認真對待此事。

articles.title: SoftBank Lenders Ask More Banks to Join $40 Billion OpenAI Loan
articles.summary: More banks are being invited to join SoftBank Group Corp.’s $40 billion loan backing its investment in US tech giant OpenAI, in one of the biggest tests yet of creditor sentiment toward the Japanese conglomerate’s debt-fueled push further into artificial intelligence.
articles.title_zh: SoftBank 貸款人邀請更多銀行加入 400 億美元 OpenAI 貸款
articles.summary_zh: SoftBank Group Corp. 邀請更多銀行加入其 400 億美元貸款計畫以支持其對美國科技巨頭 OpenAI 的投資,這是對日本集團債務驅動的 AI 擴張的最大信貸測試之一。

articles.title: Memory Crunch and Iran War Lead Phone Market Decline, IDC Says
articles.summary: The global smartphone market suffered its first decline since 2023 in the first quarter of this year, according to market tracker IDC, with the memory chip supply crunch and war in Iran likely to elevate costs and constrain growth further.
articles.title_zh: 記憶體短缺和伊朗戰爭導致手機市場下滑,IDC 表示
articles.summary_zh: 根據市場追蹤機構 IDC,全球智慧型手機市場在今年第一季出現自 2023 年以來首次下滑,記憶體芯片供應短缺和伊朗戰爭可能進一步推高成本並抑制增長。

articles.title: Meta攜手博通打造自研AI算力體系
articles.summary: Meta週二（4/14）宣布與博通（Broadcom）擴大合作，雙方將共同開發多個世代的自研AI晶片MTIA（Meta Training and Inference Accelerator），並整合晶片設計、先進封裝與高速網路技術，打造可擴展至多GW等級的AI算力基礎設施，顯示Meta正將自研晶片提升為核心算力戰略，並逐步降低對外部GPU的依賴。
articles.title_zh: Meta攜手博通打造自研AI算力體系
articles.summary_zh: Meta週二（4/14）宣布與博通（Broadcom）擴大合作，雙方將共同開發多個世代的自研AI晶片MTIA（Meta Training and Inference Accelerator），並整合晶片設計、先進封裝與高速網路技術，打造可擴展至多GW等級的AI算力基礎設施，顯示Meta正將自研晶片提升為核心算力戰略，並逐步降低對外部GPU的依賴。

articles.title: OpenAI收購AI個人金融App新創公司Hiro
articles.summary:
個人金融AI平臺供應商Hiro昨日表示將加入OpenAI，消息也獲得OpenAI證實。
Hiro成立於2023年，根據其LinkedIn公司檔案，公司員工數不到50人。Hiro定位為平價個人AI CFO，扮演消費者的AI財務規劃師角色。使用者輸入財務資訊如薪水、債務和每月支出等，Hiro AI模型會做出多個模擬情境，協助消費者執行財務決策。Hiro創辦人之一為執行長Ethan Bloch表示，該平臺迄今已為客戶管理10億美元資產。
articles.title_zh: OpenAI收購AI個人金融App新創公司Hiro
articles.summary_zh:
個人金融AI平臺供應商Hiro昨日表示將加入OpenAI，消息也獲得OpenAI證實。
Hiro成立於2023年，根據其LinkedIn公司檔案，公司員工數不到50人。Hiro定位為平價個人AI CFO，扮演消費者的AI財務規劃師角色。使用者輸入財務資訊如薪水、債務和每月支出等，Hiro AI模型會做出多個模擬情境，協助消費者執行財務決策。Hiro創辦人之一為執行長Ethan Bloch表示，該平臺迄今已為客戶管理10億美元資產。

articles.title: OpenAI公布GPT 5.4-Cyber，開放更多資安人員使用
articles.summary: 不讓Anthropic Claude Mythos專美於前，OpenAI昨（4/14）日公布專為網路安全分析訓練的模型GPT-5.4-Cyber提供資安人員使用。
articles.title_zh: OpenAI公布GPT 5.4-Cyber，開放更多資安人員使用
articles.summary_zh: 不讓Anthropic Claude Mythos專美於前，OpenAI昨（4/14）日公布專為網路安全分析訓練的模型GPT-5.4-Cyber提供資安人員使用。

articles.title: Amazon收購蘋果衛星服務供應商Globalstar，瞄準全球衛星直連與緊急通訊市場
articles.summary: Amazon週二（4/14）宣布，已與行動衛星服務業者Globalstar簽署最終合併協議，藉此強化其低軌衛星網路Amazon Leo的發展，並導入直接連接裝置（Direct-to-Device, D2D）通訊能力。雖然官方未公布整體交易金額，但媒體依每股90美元對價推估，此筆收購案規模約達115億美元，預計於2027年完成交易。
articles.title_zh: Amazon收購蘋果衛星服務供應商Globalstar，瞄準全球衛星直連與緊急通訊市場
articles.summary_zh: Amazon週二（4/14）宣布，已與行動衛星服務業者Globalstar簽署最終合併協議，藉此強化其低軌衛星網路Amazon Leo的發展，並導入直接連接裝置（Direct-to-Device, D2D）通訊能力。雖然官方未公布整體交易金額，但媒體依每股90美元對價推估，此筆收購案規模約達115億美元，預計於2027年完成交易。

articles.title: 微軟發布4月例行更新，修補SharePoint、Defender零時差漏洞
articles.summary: 一週前Anthropic發布通用語言模型Claude Mythos預覽版本，聲稱該模型已在常見的作業系統、瀏覽器、開源軟體找出數千個零時差漏洞，並設立Project Glasswing專案號召科技、金融公司、關鍵基礎設施加入，使得4月份的各大IT廠商的安全性例行更新格外受到關注，因為外界預期，廠商將會公布大量的資安漏洞，果不其然，單就今天微軟發布的公告而言，就涵蓋超過200個漏洞。
